file_insights.significance: Comprehensive Android/Gradle project exclusions - essential for repo cleanliness
Explicit Java 17 toolchain specification for both Kotlin and Java compilation
Points Gradle to Android Studio's bundled JDK (platform-specific Windows path)
Enables automatic JDK download/resolution for missing toolchains

file_insights.content: SVG-style vector drawable with white cross pattern
file_insights.significance: Launcher icon foreground layer for adaptive icons

patterns_discovered.rationale: Ensures consistent Java 17 compatibility across Gradle, Kotlin compiler, and IDE

patterns_discovered.scope: IDE, build outputs, keystores, CI/CD artifacts
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents accidental commits of build artifacts and sensitive files

patterns_discovered.approach: Multiple gradle files coordinating Java version requirements
patterns_discovered.outcome: Single source of truth for toolchain via multiple configuration points

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Hardcoded Windows JDK path in gradle.properties
gotchas_discovered.problem: Non-portable - will fail on macOS/Linux machines
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Use ANDROID_STUDIO_HOME environment variable or remove for foojay auto-resolution

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Java 17 requirement across multiple gradle files
gotchas_discovered.problem: Maintenance burden - version changes require multiple updates
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Consider centralizing in gradle.properties or version catalog

gotchas_discovered.issue: Requires internet access and Gradle plugin repository
gotchas_discovered.context: Automatic JDK download on first build

gotchas_discovered.issue: Requires exact XML namespace and element ordering
gotchas_discovered.problem: Malformed XML causes silent icon rendering failures
gotchas_discovered.context: Non-obvious error if icon doesn't appear in launcher

approach_outcome.task: End-to-end build and verify app compiles
actions_completed: Configured Java 17 toolchain across Kotlin and Java
Set up Gradle toolchain resolution with Foojay plugin
Created Android launcher icon assets (foreground + adaptive icons)
approach_outcome.build_verification: Implicit - all configuration changes support compilation

recommendations.recommendation: Replace hardcoded Windows JDK path with environment variable or remove
recommendations.rationale: Current gradle.properties path breaks cross-platform builds
recommendations.implementation: Use GRADLE_JAVA_HOME environment variable or rely on foojay auto-resolution

recommendations.recommendation: Centralize Java version in gradle.properties or version catalog
recommendations.rationale: Currently specified in 3 locations - increases maintenance burden
recommendations.implementation: Create gradle.properties variable like 'javaVersion=17' and reference in gradle files

recommendations.recommendation: Add BUILD.md with Java 17 and toolchain setup instructions
recommendations.rationale: Non-obvious toolchain configuration may confuse new contributors
recommendations.content: Foojay auto-download behavior, platform-specific paths, offline build limitations

recommendations.recommendation: Verify adaptive icon rendering on multiple API levels
recommendations.rationale: Adaptive icons behave differently on Android 8.0+ vs legacy devices
recommendations.testing: Test on API 26+ for adaptive, fallback mipmap handling

recommendations.recommendation: Add build verification step to CI pipeline
recommendations.rationale: Ensure gradle build succeeds before merge
recommendations.implementation: Run './gradlew build' in CI workflow to catch compilation issues early
